verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My hope is built on nothing less Than Jesus’ blood and righteousness, I dare not trust the sweetest frame, But holy trust is Jesus’ name.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Christ alone, Cornerstone, Weak made strong in the Savior’s love, Through the storm, He is Lord, Lord of all.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When darkness seems to hide His face, I rest on His unchanging grace, In every high and stormy gale, My anchor holds within the veil, My anchor holds within the veil.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When he shall come with trumpet sound, Oh, may I then in Him be found, Dressed in His righteousness alone, Faultless, stand before the throne,
